tasks.description: Create `src/challenges/kv_store.py` with `KVStore(capacity)` — `get(key, timestamp=0)`, `put(key, value, ttl=None, timestamp=0)`, `delete(key, timestamp=0)` using dict + doubly-linked list for O(1) LRU eviction. Keys and values are strings.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Basic get/put/delete work correctly with LRU eviction at capacity

tasks.description: Add `scan(prefix, timestamp=0)` that iterates all entries, skips expired ones, and returns a list of `(key, value)` tuples where key starts with `prefix`.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: scan returns correct key-value pairs matching the prefix, skipping expired entries

tasks.description: Implement TTL logic — store absolute expiry (`timestamp + ttl`) per entry. `get`, `scan`, and capacity checks treat expired entries as absent. Expired entries are lazily cleaned up on access.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Expired entries (based on logical timestamp) are not returned by get or scan and are evicted properly

tasks.description: Add `compact(timestamp=0)` returning a base64-encoded zlib-compressed JSON string of all non-expired entries (with LRU order and TTL metadata), and `restore(data)` that reconstructs the store from that string.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: compact/restore round-trip preserves all store state including LRU order and TTL metadata

tasks.description: Create `tests/test_kv_store.py` with comprehensive tests for all 4 levels — basic CRUD, eviction order, prefix scan, TTL expiry with logical timestamps, and compact/restore round-trips.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All tests pass covering happy paths and edge cases for each level

pr.title: Add in-memory key-value store challenge with 4 levels
pr.description:
Implements a new coding challenge: an in-memory key-value store with
progressive extensions (LRU eviction, prefix scan, TTL, compact/restore).
pr.test_plan:
- Automated: pytest tests in tests/test_kv_store.py cover all 4 levels
- Manual: verify ruff and mypy pass with strict mode
pr.manual_steps:
Pre-merge: run `uv run pytest tests/test_kv_store.py` and `uv run mypy src/challenges/kv_store.py`
Post-merge: none
